note: PNG render requires mmdc in terminal: mmdc -i <mmd_path> -o <png_path> -w 1400 -b transparent. Visual inspection pending render. Source-level pre-flight passed on all checks; layout and palette are correct.

findings.detail: Four nodes in one straight LR pipeline: Sentence 1 — Context (blue/start) → Sentence 2 — Problem (purple/auto) → Sentence 3 — Impact (purple/auto) → Well-formed Problem Statement (green/done). Governing concept 'Writing a 3-Sentence Problem Statement' is in the config title field, not a node — satisfies title-discipline. All labels ≤ 4 words, plain English, trace directly to §5.3 corpus phrases ('Context', 'Problem', 'Impact', 'Well-formed Problem Statement'). Subtitles at 12px describe the one-job-per-slot pattern ('Who is affected?', 'What exactly goes wrong?', 'Why does this matter?'). No concept drift — no solution-design nodes, no spec/requirements/build. Color palette matches project spec exactly.

preflight.label_length_check: pass — all labels ≤ 4 words (A: 'Sentence 1 — Context', B: 'Sentence 2 — Problem', C: 'Sentence 3 — Impact', D: 'Well-formed Problem Statement')
preflight.concept_fidelity_check: pass — all labels map to §5.3 (Context, Problem, Impact, Well-formed statement)
preflight.title_discipline_check: pass — governing concept in config title field
preflight.single_path_check: pass — one straight chain A→B→C→D, no branches
preflight.label_plainness_check: pass — no unexplained acronyms, all plain English
preflight.scope_discipline_check: pass — no solution-design, spec, or requirements nodes; scoped to problem-statement format only
